headline: Clear calendar and quiet inboxes — use today to drive progress on the generated evaluations design doc (AE-1079) before the next bi-weekly TR cycle.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so dashboards are available for next review
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you'll need metrics for the next Big Rock TR and MBR dashboard reviews

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: Only active Jira ticket, directly supports the Evals adoption OKR and 26.4+ deliverables; no meetings today means deep-focus time is available

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock Agents bi-weekly TR page for any action items or follow-ups assigned to you
must_make_progress.why: Last TR was 3/18; next one is imminent and you need to be prepared with evals status and any telemetry updates

must_communicate_with.person_or_team: Evals workstream leads (likely Dragos/Tomasz or Adrian)
must_communicate_with.about: Align on scope and open questions for the no-ground-truth evaluations design doc before you finalize a draft
Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures — request re-auth or new tokens

must_report_status.note: Proactively share status before next bi-weekly TR so there are no surprises

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Fix urgently.
Snowflake metrics connection is broken (empty password) — no telemetry data for dashboards or TR prep.
AE-1079 has no due date set; consider adding one to create accountability before the next TR.
March telemetry data noted as needing update in the Big Rock TR page — you may own or co-own this refresh.

outcomes.business_impact: No customer-facing or business-critical actions resolved yet today; restoring Salesforce visibility is the highest-leverage move to ensure no escalations are being missed.
outcomes.product_adoption: Advancing the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) directly supports the Evals adoption OKR and unblocks broader generated-evaluations capability for 26.4+.

slack_summary: Quiet day with zero meetings — ideal for deep work. Top priority: make real progress on the generated evaluations design doc (AE-1079) which feeds the 26.4 evals deliverable. Second priority: fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth so you have visibility into escalations and metrics before the next bi-weekly TR. No meetings today.
